# Format: <msr_hex_addr>:<cpu_num>|<hex_val> ... for every CPU ...
1b0:0|6 1|6 2|6 3|6 4|6 5|6 6|6 7|6
771:0|1121934 1|1121934 2|1121934 3|1121934 4|1111523 5|1111523 6|1111523 7|1111523
774:0|80003405 1|80003405 2|80003405 3|80003405 4|80002304 5|80002304 6|80002304 7|80002304
772:0|8000ff01 1|8000ff01 2|8000ff01 3|8000ff01 4|8000ff01 5|8000ff01 6|8000ff01 7|8000ff01
e2:0|74008008 1|74008008 2|74008008 3|74008008 4|74008008 5|74008008 6|74008008 7|74008008
770:0|1 1|1 2|1 3|1 4|1 5|1 6|1 7|1
1fc:0|e4005b 1|e4005b 2|e4005b 3|e4005b 4|e4005b 5|e4005b 6|e4005b 7|e4005b
